note: Candidate products the autonomous factory loop builds to CODE-COMPLETE (doorstep), one per run, in priority order. Founder gates (deploy/keys/money/publish) are never crossed autonomously. The loop may also append new candidates it generates, honoring each factory's guardrail.

candidates.name: Invoice Aging Snapshot
candidates.what_it_is: Upload an AR/invoice CSV -> a clean 30/60/90 aging report + who-owes-what summary as XLSX + one-page PDF. Organizational tooling only.
candidates.buyer: Freelancers and small shops chasing unpaid invoices without accounting software.
candidates.guardrail: organizational tooling only; no financial/collections advice

candidates.name: Link & QR Safety Report
candidates.what_it_is: Paste a URL or upload a QR image -> an offline heuristic safety report (redirect chain, punycode/homoglyph, known-bad patterns, TLS surface). Clearly labeled heuristic, not a guarantee.
candidates.buyer: Cautious consumers and small-biz owners vetting a link before clicking.
candidates.guardrail: heuristic only; never claim certainty; no real-world security decision advice

candidates.name: Compliance Change Digest
candidates.what_it_is: Given provided regulatory/source docs -> a cited plain-English digest of what changed, who it affects, and an explicit uncertainty section. Citation-per-claim enforced.
candidates.buyer: Small compliance/ops teams tracking rule changes without a research staff.
candidates.guardrail: information not legal advice; every claim cited; uncertainty section mandatory
candidates.tests: 11 engine (citation linter) + 10 buyloop, all pass (node v22)

candidates.name: Podcast Intro & Transition Sting Pack
candidates.what_it_is: Themed packs of short instrumental stings/transitions with an attached usage license. License-gated delivery. Founder supplies cleared audio.
candidates.buyer: Independent podcasters needing cheap, license-clean audio furniture.
candidates.guardrail: instrumental-only; no vocals/voice-likeness; license-gate mandatory; no fabricated audio

candidates.name: Coloring Book Export
candidates.what_it_is: Turn an in-browser created story into a printable line-art coloring PDF; pay to export watermark-free. Child-safe.
candidates.buyer: Parents and teachers wanting a printable activity from a story.
candidates.guardrail: child-facing -> safe content; watermark-free only after purchase
